I just read GRamonas psyche deep dive. And Im very confused about the lore. For reference Im at chapter 7 so dont spoil any future events. Only explain it if its something I should already know but missed or misunderstood.

What exactly is she trying to prevent. Why does the whole world dissappear in each loop? What makes this timeline different than the main timeline? Why is she trying to kill Tawil and how is Tawil linked to the the world ending? Why does the keeper die even after Tawil is killed?

To be honest I was preety confused about the events of the prologue too. So Im wondering if I missed something obvious
||N|| is having too much fun with this role
I can't believe I forgot about this part <:please:1356053110375714817> Mama Lotan and the kiddies
in gramonas timeline, tawil killed keeper in the prologue, which somehow snowballed into the dissolution taking over the entire world.
tawil keeps the black pool under control, so with her dead, it goes out of control and swallows keeper

See that part confuses me. Why would she kill the keeper. She stops when she see the keeper in the prologue. Even in  GRamonas story she stops when she sees our timelines Keeper in front of her. So she clearly stops attacking if the keeper gets in front of her.

If its just a mistake or something. Why would it be so hard for GRamona to keep the keeper alive in at least one of the time loops where she brings them? Surely after she keeps the keeper alive for a bit of time Tawil notices them and stops attacking. GRamona even see that scene from our timeline. So what's stopping her from just trying to loop again and make that scene happen in her world?

So is the keeper from our timeline just different from the keeper in GRamonas timeline? Are they not special and so Tawil wont stop attacking them? Or is Tawil herself different in that timeline?
||the Black Pool was going out of control before she even saw Keeper, so in this timeline Keeper can’t reach Tawil in time so the timeline is doomed ||

Oh I see. But that raises another question. GRamona can time travel.

Why not just bring the keeper there earlier. Before she looses control. I mean she mentions she can even go back far enough to before she even met the keeper
And why did Tawil stop when she saw our timelines keeper. If shes already out of control and wont stop
Because of sth called “Canon Event”

you can’t change Fate that easily unless you’re Arachne
and it’s not like Arachne can really do anything she wants to
because she saw ||a glimpse of hope for this world||
So that timeline is fated to end terribly no matter what?

the Gramona story is pretty straightforward 
she can’t ||rewind it no matter what||
||That Keeper is destined to died there||

So she was just unlucky to be from the world where no other outcome is possible.

And I guess our timeline has a sepperate destiny?
yup

One last question. It mentions every awakener has a genesis they draw power from. Some interdimensional being or something.

Is the genesis just a god version of that person? Which is why only different timeline versions of the same person share a genesis.

Or do genesis give powers to multiple different people. And its possible for completely sepperate people to share a genesis?
Dont tell me if it gets revealed later on in the story
the genesis is more or less an in-universe term for "the Lovecraftian entity they are based on"
genesis units are "closer" to their Higher Will

they’re ||the real eldritch entities||
the Genesis Awakeners are ||awakeners with more trait from their respective eldritch source, or you can say closer to theit gods||

Oh I see. Is That why some people dont have a fully formed silver core?

Because their genesis is too weak and a minor creature?
nope
silver is gacha
silver seems to be independent from genesis
there is a chance you don’t have a silver
just get lucky to not be forgotten
silver is not that easily to form anw

So does every person (theoretically) have a genesis. Im not talking about awakeners.

Or do they connect with a genesis when they become an awakener?
the latter
what venush said
it’s all come down to luck

But they show a lot of the traits of what they are based on even before they become an awakener. Why is that if they arent connected yet?

Or is it that they connect with a specific genesis, BECAUSE they share traits
N is Francis for that moment?
biav don’t want to draw a separate human sprite for everyone
they made the awakener art first and foremost
and then just simplify it in the story to pretend this is their human form
when it’s not the case if you understand the story contexts
this is truly our indie game moment
Alright thanks for the answers. The lore and story is a bit confusing
thats what lorechat is for. you're welcome to ask anytime :3/
